validated_commands.build_notes: Use .dotnet/dotnet (local SDK, .NET 11 preview). net8.0/net9.0 targeting packs ARE available and build succeeds. CI is authoritative for full tests.

completed_prs.title: [Efficiency Improver] perf: reduce allocations in BFSTestNodeVisitor path tracking and CreateWrappedName
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate state-machine allocations in PropertyBag.Single<T>() and SingleOrDefault<T>()
[Efficiency Improver] perf: skip PropertyBag construction in BFSTestNodeVisitor when filter has no property expressions
[Efficiency Improver] perf: eliminate yield-iterator state machine in PropertyBag.OfType<T>()

GetRetryAttribute + TryExecuteDataSourceBasedTestsAsync yield-iterator fixes, rebased on current main 2026-05-11, PR creation attempted

backlog.title: PropertyBag.GetEnumerator() returns IEnumerator<IProperty> (boxes PropertyBagEnumerator struct). Return struct type directly for zero-alloc duck-typed foreach.
backlog.notes: Would eliminate last alloc in property filter path. Requires breaking public API change — not allowed by repo rules.

backlog.title: TestMethodValidator.IsValid: parameters.Any(p => p.IsOut || p.ParameterType.IsByRef) lambda — discovery path only, low impact
backlog.notes: Compile captures nothing so delegate is likely cached by JIT. Low impact — only called during test discovery.

notes.create_pr_tool_behavior: create_pull_request tool returns 'success' with patch file path. May or may not push branch to remote. The branch must be pre-committed locally before calling. PR creation is unreliable — check GitHub after run to verify.
notes.build_env_2026-05-11: Local build succeeds for net8.0 + net9.0 with .NET 11 preview SDK. Both MSTestAdapter.PlatformServices and MSTest.TestAdapter build with 0 warnings/errors.
notes.yield_iterator_fix_branch: efficiency/avoid-yield-iterator-get-retry-attribute committed 2026-05-11. Changes: GetRetryAttribute uses GetCustomAttributesCached directly; TryExecuteDataSourceBasedTestsAsync uses IsAttributeDefined<DataSourceAttribute>.
notes.sa1503_warning: SA1503: braces must not be omitted — always use braces even for single-statement if bodies.
notes.treenodefilter_closures: Covered by community PR #8035 (abdelghani-moussaid). Open and awaiting review.
notes.scan_status: All major hot-path allocation issues addressed. Backlog is low-priority only. Fresh scan needed in future runs to find new opportunities after merges.
